expectations.text: Provides a concrete version-controllable manifest/config (YAML or equivalent declarative file)
expectations.evidence: Two AgentGrant YAML manifests plus an OPA/Rego policy file, all PR-reviewed in a repo layout.

expectations.text: Explicitly enforces that agent permissions are a STRICT subset of the human owner's permissions
expectations.evidence: Enforces subsetOf:owner as 'subset... never a superset' (permits equality, i.e. ⊆ not ⊂); never requires at least one capability be withheld, so strictness is not guaranteed.

expectations.text: Sending external/client email requires elevated human approval (not autonomous)
expectations.evidence: External email.send routed through approvals.required with timeoutAction: deny; CI rule forbids un-gated external send.

expectations.text: HR data is isolated from the agent by default (default-deny / domain isolation)
expectations.evidence: data.read is default-deny with row + column filters; denyColumns excludes ssn/salary/medical.

expectations.text: Uses a graduated/three-tier approval model (autonomous vs soft vs strong approval)
expectations.evidence: Approvals are a binary requireApproval flag (true/false); no graduated soft-vs-strong oversight distinction.
